boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation matches vendor/term/signature but amount ceiling violated by source record
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 sets USD 50000 ceiling; REN-WRE-077 states USD 50750
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect open: renewal amount exceeds delegation ceiling
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Signature date precedes release; amount mismatch blocks closure

final_answer: Action boundary remains open. DEL-WRE-077 authorizes up to USD 50000 but REN-WRE-077 records USD 50750 renewal. Policy requires exact match on amount ceiling before release. Near-threshold warning note does not override this defect. ESCALATE for resolution of source inconsistency.
